questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to determine the highest temperature recorded in a week.

Write a Python program to:
  • prompt the user to enter the temperature for each day
  • repeat this input process for 7 days
  • determine which temperature is the highest
  • output the highest temperature in an appropriate message
questions.explanation:
Format:
highest = 0
for i in range(7):
    temp = float(input('Enter temperature: '))
    if temp > highest:
        highest = temp
print('Highest temperature:', highest)
